human_actions_pending.context: Plan 03 is autonomous: false -- user must run localhost:5173 and test hover tooltip and failed placement feedback

decisions.rationale: The row overlap is the isometric 3D art style of Kenney sprites, not a scale bug. Values 54/96, 54/112, 54/116 all made visible white border collision worse. The original value is correct for fitting sprite width to cell width.

decisions.decision: updateSelector is module-level (not a class method)
decisions.rationale: Plan 03 calls updateSelector(this) from within create() -- module-level placement allows this without exposing it on the scene instance
User asked for DevMode tile lookup (had it in the original prototype). Adding (col, row) to the hover tooltip serves this need without a separate toggle. Discussed during Plan 02 checkpoint.

next_action: Execute Plan 03 T02: add pointermove tooltip handler (with col/row coords), D-key toggle, friendlyReason function, and expanded pointerdown rejection feedback to src/scenes/GameScene.js. Read the full GameScene.js first -- many additions land in create() at specific insertion points relative to existing blocks.
context_notes: Plan 03 PLAN.md has extremely specific insertion instructions. Read it carefully. The tooltip should include col/row coordinates (user request). Use this.time.delayedCall for canvas tint restore -- NOT setTimeout. friendlyReason() goes at module level after updateSelector.
